title: 1. Preparation. If the patient takes a standing position for bleeding, place som
text:
feet. If the patient bends over for bleeding, place some drape sheets (paper) under the location to be
bled. For example, if WeiZhong is to be bled, put some papers under the knee; if TaiYang is to be bled,
place a bucket on the ground to let the blood drop into the bucket. All these preparations must be done
before treatment.
